arguments.argument: /* shroudProg 0: Player has not come within spawning range (skip if Shrouds are following) 1: Shrouds are spawning (3 second wait time) 2: Spawn Shrouds (multiple of 2 will spawn) 3: Wait for player to kill Shrouds or leave map 4: Shrouds defeated 5: Player died */ shroudProg=0 spawnTime=0 blazingTime=0
